daily_summary.headline: Aurora Alert: Best Viewing on March 6

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A potential aurora event with Kp 4.33 is expected on March 6, best visible above 65° latitude.
top_events.action: Check conditions and prepare for viewing.

top_events.title: KAIROS Flight 3
top_events.description: Third flight of the KAIROS launch vehicle carrying 5 satellites to Sun-Synchronous Orbit.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for the launch.

top_events.title: Starlink Group 17-18
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 will launch a batch of 25 Starlink satellites into Low Earth Orbit.
top_events.action: Follow live updates and watch the launch online.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
